description: The Azimut Grande 35 is an award-winning tri-deck luxury yacht. Built out of carbon fiber and composites, it features a side-garage for a tender, a private owner's balcony, and high-end master suites.
The Sunseeker Predator 74 is a high-performance sport yacht with an aggressive profile. Its sliding glass roof and large cockpit merge the salon with the sea, hitting speeds of 40 knots.
The Princess X95 redefines yacht design with a Super Flybridge layout, offering expansive outdoor and indoor spaces. Powered by twin MAN engines, it provides fuel-efficient cruising.
Ferretti Yachts' new flagship, the Ferretti 1000, is a stunning 100-foot superyacht. With large windows, a beach club transom, and luxury furnishings, it cruises at 28 knots.
The Oasis 40M introduces a unique beach club lifestyle with unfolding wings at sea level and an integrated glass-backed pool. An elegant interior layout by Bonetti/Kozerski.
The Benetti B.Now 50M features a striking exterior design with an Oasis Deck aft. It offers customized pool areas, wellness spaces, and accommodates 12 guests.
The Sunreef 80 Eco is a fully-electric luxury catamaran utilizing solar panels integrated into the composite structure. Silent, fuel-free cruising with unlimited range.
The Lagoon Seventy 8 is a luxurious power catamaran boasting immense beam width. Featuring a massive owner's suite with a private swim deck and state-of-the-art galley.
The Majesty 140 is a tri-deck masterpiece of luxury engineering, featuring a spacious flybridge, fold-out balconies, and high-end Italian design accents.
The Ocean Alexander 35R showcases a modern, vertical bow and full-height windows. Accommodates 10 guests in custom luxury suites, featuring a top-deck hot tub.
The Horizon FD110 is a fast displacement motor yacht with an expansive layout. Complete with a beach club, five staterooms, and a flybridge lounge.
The Pershing 8X is a lightweight carbon fiber sports yacht that achieves speeds of up to 48 knots. High-power surface drives provide unmatched thrills.
The Riva 110 Dolcevita is a design masterpiece featuring expansive glass styling. Sleek profile, high-class mahogany trim, and premium leather detailing.
A custom 312-foot mega yacht from Lürssen. Includes a dedicated helicopter pad, a large swimming pool, cinema, spa, and accommodations for 20 guests.
The Heesen Project Cosmos is a fast-all-aluminum superyacht. Delivering a huge 19,000 HP via quad engines, it features a glass-bottomed pool and luxury gym.
The Black Pearl is the world's largest sailing yacht. Utilizing a revolutionary DynaRig sail system, it can cross the Atlantic with zero fuel consumption.
Feadship's custom 308-foot superyacht Viva is built with a hybrid propulsion system. Incredible floor-to-ceiling glass windows and custom curved superstructure.
The Amels 60 features hybrid propulsion and a striking geometric exterior by Espen Øino. Accommodates 12 guests in premium bespoke luxury suites.
The Wider 165 features a diesel-electric hybrid system. It includes a submarine garage, a touch-and-go helipad, and a large sea-level beach club.
The Sanlorenzo SX112 crossovers the flybridge and explorer concepts. Features a massive stern zone with foldable sea balconies and an open beach villa format.
Designed in collaboration with Citterio Viel, the Navetta 30 is a spacious tri-deck displacement yacht combining traditional lines with high-end modern design.
The Wallywhy200 features a futuristic high-bow glass wrap-around cabin. It offers massive deck space equivalent to a much larger yacht, hitting 23 knots.
